commands.review_summary:
The PR replaces APNs relay `response.json()` parsing with a 16 MiB bounded response read and adds relay response regression tests for oversized, empty, BOM-prefixed, and normal bodies.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +87. Total +119 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main and `v2026.6.10` call `response.json()` in the APNs relay response path, so an oversized relay body is buffered before parsing. I did not run local tests because this review is read-only, but the PR body and Real behavior proof check provide loopback relay proof for the bounded path.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No narrow automated repair remains; the next action is maintainer acceptance of the intentional compatibility/security tradeoff plus normal CI completion.
